Why SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Stock Is Down 10% This Week
data.description: SolarEdge Technologies shares have fallen 83% year-to-date. JPMorgan analysts lowered their estimates following Enphase Energy's disappointing Q3 2024 results.

data.title: Overstock, Bed Bath & Beyond Owner Reports Lower Sales And Wider Loss In Q3, Aims To Cut $65M In Fixed Costs By 2025
data.description: Beyond, Inc. stock drops after reporting weaker-than-expected Q3 2024 earnings, with a wider EPS loss, lower sales, and efforts to cut costs and transform its business.
